title: Elatine graeca
taxonomy: Elatine graeca belongs to the family Elatinaceae, which is a small family of flowering plants. The genus Elatine is further divided into several species, with Elatine graeca being one of them. This plant is a type of waterwort, characterized by its ability to thrive in aquatic environments. Elatine graeca is native to the Mediterranean region and is often found in shallow waters and wetlands. It is a perennial plant that produces small, white flowers.
